metadata.title: Car Mod Visualizer Pricing Plans | CarModSnap
metadata.description: Choose the best CarModSnap plan for AI car rendering, 3D modification previews, and high-quality export credits.

pricing.title: Plans for every kind of build
pricing.description: Visualize wraps, wheels, and body kits with AI. Pick monthly to try things out, or save 20% with annual billing.

items.title: Starter
items.description: Try AI-powered car visualization with 100 credits per month.

items.description: More credits, all build modes, and project saving.
items.label: Popular
items.tip: Most chosen plan for serious modders.

items.title: Premium
items.description: Everything unlocked, with commercial license and API access.
items.tip: Best for shops and content creators.

feature_comparison.title: Feature Comparison
feature_comparison.description: Compare features across all plans to find the best fit for your build.

features_detail.title: Detailed Features
features_detail.description: Everything you need to visualize and plan your car modification.

features.title: Wrap Color Visualizer
features.description: Preview matte, satin, and gloss wrap finishes on your exact vehicle model. Compare colors side-by-side before booking installation.

features.title: Wheel Fitment Preview
features.description: Visualize different wheel sizes, offsets, and styles on your car. See how custom rims look before purchasing.

features.title: Body Kit Visualizer
features.description: Preview aero kits, front lips, side skirts, and rear diffusers. See aggressive body modifications in photorealistic quality.

features.title: Before/After Simulator
features.description: Generate side-by-side comparisons of your stock vs modified build. Perfect for planning and sharing your vision.

features.title: HD/4K/8K Downloads
features.description: Export high-resolution images suitable for social media, print, or large-format displays depending on your plan.

features.title: Multi-Angle Views
features.description: Generate multiple viewing angles of your modified build for comprehensive visualization.

features.title: Project Saving
features.description: Save your modification projects and revisit them later. Build multiple concepts for comparison.

features.title: Batch Generation
features.description: Generate multiple variations at once. Compare different color combinations and modification styles efficiently.

features.title: Commercial License
features.description: Use generated images for commercial purposes including marketing materials, client presentations, and social media management.

features.title: API Access
features.description: Integrate CarModSnap visualization into your existing workflow or applications via our REST API.

money_back.title: 7-Day Refund Window
money_back.description: Refund within 7 days if you've used less than 20% of credits. See refund policy.

secure_payment.title: Secure Payment via Creem
secure_payment.description: Encrypted checkout via Creem. Card data never touches our servers.

cancel_anytime.title: Cancel Anytime
cancel_anytime.description: No long-term contracts. Cancel from Settings → Billing in one click.

instant_access.title: Instant Access
instant_access.description: Credits and paid features unlock immediately after checkout.

faq.title: Pricing FAQ
faq.description: Quick answers to the questions we get most about plans, credits, and refunds.

items.question: What's a credit, and what does it cost?
items.answer: One credit covers one AI generation request (for example, one wrap-color render or one body-kit preview). Credits are granted at the start of each billing period. Higher plans grant more credits and unlock advanced modes such as body kits, batch generation, and 8K export.

items.question: What's the difference between monthly and yearly?
items.answer: Yearly billing charges once for 12 months at a 20% discount versus paying monthly. Yearly plans grant the full annual credit allowance up front (Starter 1,200 / Standard 3,600 / Premium 9,600), valid until the next renewal — you decide your own pace across the year. Yearly is the better deal if you plan to use CarModSnap for at least a few months.

items.question: Can I cancel anytime?
items.answer: Yes. You can cancel from Settings → Billing at any time. Your subscription stays active until the end of the current billing period (the month or the year you paid for), and it won't renew after that.

items.question: Do unused credits roll over?
items.answer: Credits granted at the start of a billing period are valid until that period ends. Monthly credits expire at the end of the month; yearly credits are valid for the full year. They do not stockpile across periods.

items.question: What's your refund policy?
items.answer: First-time charges are eligible for a full refund within 7 days, as long as no more than 20% of the credits granted by that charge have been used. Renewals, heavily-used credit packs, and accounts terminated for abuse are generally not refundable. For full details, see our Refund Policy.

items.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade later?
items.answer: Yes. You can change plans from Settings → Billing. Upgrades take effect immediately and any difference is prorated. Downgrades typically take effect at the start of the next billing period.

items.question: How does payment work? Is it safe?
items.answer: Checkout is handled by our payment provider Creem (with Stripe and PayPal supported in some flows). Your card details are entered on the provider's secure environment and are never stored on CarModSnap servers.

items.question: Can I use generated images commercially?
items.answer: The Premium plan includes a commercial usage license for the AI-generated images you create on CarModSnap (subject to our Terms of Service and any rights of the underlying vehicle / brand owners).
